title: xylobium bicolor
intro: Xylobium bicolor, also known as the orchid tree or lady orchid, is a type of flowering plant in the orchid family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Xylobium bicolor include treating various ailments such as fever, cough, and skin infections, as well as aiding in wound healing and reducing inflammation. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing the flowers or roots in hot water to create a tea, or by drying and grinding them into a powder to use in capsules or topical applications.
